name: Alligator Sauce Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the alligator meat in Tabasco sauce and lemon juice for 30 minutes before cooking. Rinse the meat thoroughly prior to cooking.
2. Prepare a roux by mixing 1 cup of oil with 1 cup of flour and cook until it turns golden brown.
3. Add chopped onions to the roux and sauté until they turn brown.
4. Stir in tomato paste and sugar, then cook for about 5 minutes.
5. Incorporate chopped bell pepper, celery, garlic, and mushrooms into the mixture. Stir well to combine.
6. Add water and cook over low heat for 1 hour until the meat is tender.
7. Include chopped scallions, parsley, and season with salt, pepper, and cayenne to taste. Cover and continue cooking slowly for an additional 30 minutes or until the meat reaches desired tenderness.
8. Add soaked salad olives and cook for a few more minutes before serving over cooked rice.
